title: AdministrativeBoundaryFeatureCollection
description: A standard GeoJSON FeatureCollection of Polygon/MultiPolygon boundaries for one level of Uganda's administrative hierarchy (currently: region, district). Geometry itself follows the GeoJSON spec (RFC 7946) as-is; this schema only constrains the `properties` object each feature carries, which links the polygon back to the corresponding AdministrativeUnit record in dist/uganda-locations.json.

id.description: Matches the id of the corresponding record in dist/uganda-locations.json (e.g. 'district:mbarara', 'region:western').

region_id.description: Present on district-level features; null/absent on region-level features (a region has no parent region).

subregion_id.description: Present on district-level features; the cultural/traditional sub-region, see schema/administrative-unit.schema.json.

source_ids.description: References into data/sources.json. Absent on region-level features, which are derived from the district geometry rather than an independent source — see their 'source' property instead.

source.description: Present on region-level features only: a plain-text note that the geometry was dissolved from district-level features rather than sourced independently.

population.description: Present on district-level features only (null on region-level features). Same shape as the `population` property on AdministrativeUnit records — see schema/administrative-unit.schema.json — merged in at build time for direct choropleth-map use.
